name: triflux
description: CLI-first multi-model orchestrator — Codex/Gemini/Claude routing with DAG execution, auto-triage, and cost optimization

plugins.name: triflux
plugins.description: CLI-first multi-model orchestrator for Claude Code. Routes tasks to Codex, Gemini, and Claude CLIs with automatic triage, DAG-based parallel execution, headless psmux sessions, and cost-optimized routing. Includes 41 skills, HUD status bar, hook orchestrator, and shell-based CLI routing.
